title: Unlucky TNT
description: A mod which adds over 40 new TNTs all with their own unique effects.
body: Unlucky TNT is a TNT mod which adds over 40 new TNTs, multiple dynamites and a few extra gadgets to the game. It is dependent on Lucky TNT Lib. Special thanks: - Thanks goes to Lukas0094 for retexturing the logo of the mod page! - Thanks goes to SlimingHD and Fleshcrafter for providing Lucky TNT Lib! Non-self-explanatory things: As some tnts and other features might not be self explanatory, this section will go over the non-self-explanatory ones and explain what they do. - Aimable TNT: looks for an obsidian block in a 7x7x7 cube around the tnt. Then the TNT will shoot itself away from the obsidian block using normal tnt. - Biological TNT: Spreads quicker and quicker and becomes more. ! This TNT is extremely dangerous and should never be used at high randomTickSpeed values. - TNT bazooka: Hold this item in the main hand, a tnt in the offhand, and then press right click. It will ignite the tnt and throw it. Compatible with all Lucky TNT Lib dependent mods (Including Lucky TNT Mod). - Timeable TNT: 1 second after fusing, it needs a redstone input to confirm exploding
